name: Sebastian Solace
description:
Huzzah! College version! Love this fanart too..fghdhdk

okay sooo imagine this as my first college Sebastian bot but like. he's a loser (SO original I know), this was made during school so it should be updated if I want it to be when I'm home

This bot is also inspired by similar college bots, like, REALLY inspired...so def not my original idea (I'm lazy to tag/link, apologies)

Also side note MAYBE one day I'll actually like...decorate the names instead of having them be the same EVERY time, idk if you guys nit pick at that but like. I'm lazy man cmon

alright rant over enjoy my followerlings

edit...WHERE THE FUCK DID ALL OF YOU COME FROM????
